description: Auto-detect file format and load it into a clean output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME_PREFIX
parameters.help: Prefix prepended to the original filename to form the output filename.

parameters.name: ENCODING_PRIMARY
parameters.help: First encoding to try when reading text files.

parameters.name: ENCODING_FALLBACK_1
parameters.help: Second encoding to try if ENCODING_PRIMARY fails.

parameters.name: ENCODING_FALLBACK_2
parameters.help: Third encoding to try if ENCODING_FALLBACK_1 fails.

description: Vertically stack (union) multiple files. Handles column mismatches and optional source tagging.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

parameters.name: ADD_SOURCE_TAG
parameters.help: If True, adds a column with the source filename.

parameters.name: SOURCE_TAG_COLUMN
parameters.help: Name of the source tag column (used when ADD_SOURCE_TAG=True).

description: Join two files on a single key column with configurable join type. Files are resolved by name from the input list — order does not matter.

parameters.name: LEFT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the left (primary) file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: RIGHT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the right file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: LEFT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the left file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: RIGHT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the right file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: LEFT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the left input is a ZIP, extract this named file (e.g. customers.csv). "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the right input is a ZIP, extract this named file (e.g. invoices.csv). "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: DEDUP_RIGHT_BY
parameters.help: Column to deduplicate the right file on before joining. "" = skip deduplication.

parameters.name: DEDUP_KEEP
parameters.help: Which duplicate to keep when deduplicating: "first" or "last".

parameters.name: JOIN_KEY
parameters.help: Shared column name to join on. Used when LEFT_KEY and RIGHT_KEY are both empty.

parameters.name: LEFT_KEY
parameters.help: Override: join key column name in the left file. Leave empty to use JOIN_KEY.

parameters.name: RIGHT_KEY
parameters.help: Override: join key column name in the right file. Leave empty to use JOIN_KEY.

parameters.name: JOIN_TYPE
parameters.help: inner | left | right | outer

parameters.name: LEFT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the left file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the right file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DROP_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to drop from the merged result before writing. [] = keep all columns.

parameters.name: INSERT_COLUMN
parameters.help: Reposition this column immediately after INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN. "" = skip reordering.

parameters.name: INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Anchor column — INSERT_COLUMN is placed immediately after this column.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file. "" = same directory as the left input file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the merged output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Chain-join three or more files sequentially. Each step defines the next file to join and the key to join on. Files can be resolved by filename (recommended) or by position.

parameters.name: BASE_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the base (primary) file to start the join chain. "" = use first file in input_paths.

parameters.name: JOIN_STEPS
parameters.help: List of join steps. Each step: {"filename": "file.csv", "join_key": "col", "join_type": "left|inner|right|outer", "left_suffix": "_x", "right_suffix": "_y"}. Use 'filename' (matched by basename, order-independent) or legacy 'file_index' (positional). 'filename' takes priority.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file. "" = same directory as the base input file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the final merged output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Join two files on multiple key columns simultaneously (composite key). Files are resolved by name from the input list — order does not matter.

parameters.name: LEFT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the left (primary) file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: RIGHT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the right file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: LEFT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the left file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: RIGHT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the right file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: LEFT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the left input is a ZIP, extract this named file (e.g. customers.csv). "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the right input is a ZIP, extract this named file (e.g. invoices.csv). "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: DEDUP_RIGHT_BY
parameters.help: Column to deduplicate the right file on before joining. "" = skip deduplication.

parameters.name: DEDUP_KEEP
parameters.help: Which duplicate to keep when deduplicating: "first" or "last".

parameters.name: JOIN_KEYS
parameters.help: List of shared column names to join on. Used when LEFT_KEYS and RIGHT_KEYS are both empty.

parameters.name: LEFT_KEYS
parameters.help: Override: list of join key column names in the left file. Leave [] to use JOIN_KEYS.

parameters.name: RIGHT_KEYS
parameters.help: Override: list of join key column names in the right file. Leave [] to use JOIN_KEYS.

parameters.name: JOIN_TYPE
parameters.help: inner | left | right | outer

parameters.name: LEFT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the left file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the right file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DROP_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to drop from the merged result before writing. [] = keep all columns.

parameters.name: INSERT_COLUMN
parameters.help: Reposition this column immediately after INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN. "" = skip reordering.

parameters.name: INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Anchor column — INSERT_COLUMN is placed immediately after this column.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file. "" = same directory as the left input file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the merged output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Join a header (master) file and a detail file; prefix all detail columns. Files are resolved by name from the input list — order does not matter.

parameters.name: HEADER_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the header (master) file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: DETAIL_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the detail file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: LEFT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the header (master) file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: RIGHT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the detail file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: LEFT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the header input is a ZIP, extract this named file. "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the detail input is a ZIP, extract this named file. "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: DEDUP_RIGHT_BY
parameters.help: Column to deduplicate the detail file on before joining. "" = skip deduplication.

parameters.name: DEDUP_KEEP
parameters.help: Which duplicate to keep when deduplicating: "first" or "last".

parameters.name: JOIN_KEY
parameters.help: Shared column name. Used when LEFT_KEY and RIGHT_KEY are both empty.

parameters.name: LEFT_KEY
parameters.help: Override: join key column name in the header file. Leave empty to use JOIN_KEY.

parameters.name: RIGHT_KEY
parameters.help: Override: join key column name in the detail file. Leave empty to use JOIN_KEY.

parameters.name: JOIN_TYPE
parameters.help: inner | left | right | outer

parameters.name: LEFT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the header file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the detail file.

parameters.name: DETAIL_PREFIX
parameters.help: Prefix added to every detail column (except the join key).

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DROP_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to drop from the merged result before writing. [] = keep all columns.

parameters.name: INSERT_COLUMN
parameters.help: Reposition this column immediately after INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN. "" = skip reordering.

parameters.name: INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Anchor column — INSERT_COLUMN is placed immediately after this column.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file. "" = same directory as the header input file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Split a file into one output file per unique value in a chosen column.

parameters.name: SPLIT_COLUMN
parameters.help: Column whose distinct values drive the split.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write split files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

parameters.name: FILENAME_TEMPLATE
parameters.help: Template for split output filenames. Supports {split_column} and {value} placeholders.

parameters.name: INCLUDE_SPLIT_COLUMN
parameters.help: If True, the split column is retained in every output file. If False, it is dropped.

description: Route rows to named output files using pandas query() expressions.

parameters.name: FILTER_RULES
parameters.help: List of rules. Each: {"condition": "pandas query string", "output_filename": "name.csv"}

parameters.name: UNMATCHED_FILENAME
parameters.help: File for rows matching no rule. Empty string to discard.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Split a wide file into multiple narrower files, each containing a subset of columns.

parameters.name: COMMON_KEY_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns repeated in every output file (e.g. primary key).

parameters.name: COLUMN_GROUPS
parameters.help: List of groups. Each: {"columns": ["col1", "col2"], "output_filename": "name.csv"}

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Remove duplicate rows based on selected key columns.

parameters.name: KEY_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns that together define a duplicate.

parameters.name: KEEP
parameters.help: first | last | none (keep=False drops all duplicates)

parameters.name: DUPLICATES_REPORT_FILENAME
parameters.help: File for removed duplicate rows. Empty string to discard.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the deduplicated output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Rename columns via a mapping dict; optionally drop unmapped columns.

parameters.name: COLUMN_MAPPING
parameters.help: Dict of {old_column_name: new_column_name} pairs.

parameters.name: DROP_UNMAPPED
parameters.help: If True, only columns present in COLUMN_MAPPING are kept in the output.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Audit and clean null values: fill, drop, or flag per column.

parameters.name: NULL_RULES
parameters.help: List of per-column null handling rules. Each: {"column": "col_or_*", "strategy": "fill_value|fill_mean|fill_median|fill_mode|fill_forward|fill_backward|drop_row", "value": "optional_fill_value"}. Use column="*" to apply a rule to all columns.

parameters.name: NULL_VALUES
parameters.help: List of string values to treat as null before applying NULL_RULES.

parameters.name: NULL_REPORT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename for the pre-clean null audit report. Empty string to skip.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the cleaned output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Cast columns to target types (int, float, date, bool, str, currency).

parameters.name: TYPE_RULES
parameters.help: List of cast rules. Each: {"column": "col", "target_type": "int|float|str|bool|date|currency", "date_format": "%Y-%m-%d" (required for date type)}.

parameters.name: STRIP_CURRENCY
parameters.help: Strip £$€ and commas before casting currency columns.

parameters.name: TRIM_STRINGS
parameters.help: Strip leading and trailing whitespace from all string columns before casting.

parameters.name: ON_ERROR
parameters.help: What to do when a cast fails: nullify | keep_original | drop_row

parameters.name: CAST_ERROR_REPORT_FILENAME
parameters.help: File for rows with cast errors. Empty string to discard error rows.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Group rows by key columns and apply aggregate functions per metric column.

parameters.name: GROUP_BY_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to group by.

parameters.name: AGGREGATIONS
parameters.help: Aggregation rules. Each: {"column": "col", "function": "sum|mean|min|max|count|nunique|first|last|std", "output_column": "result_col"}.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Compare a new file against an old file and tag rows as NEW / CHANGED / DELETED. Files are resolved by name from the input list — order does not matter.

parameters.name: NEW_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the current (new) file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: OLD_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the baseline (previous) file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: LEFT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the new (current) file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: RIGHT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the old (baseline) file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: LEFT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the new file input is a ZIP, extract this named file. "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the old file input is a ZIP, extract this named file. "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: KEY_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns that uniquely identify a record.

parameters.name: COMPARE_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to check for changes. Empty list [] = compare ALL non-key columns.

parameters.name: DELTA_MODE
parameters.help: new_only | changed_only | full_delta (NEW + CHANGED + DELETED)

parameters.name: DELTA_STATUS_COLUMN
parameters.help: Name of the status column added to every output row. Values: NEW | CHANGED | DELETED.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DROP_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to drop from the delta result before writing. [] = keep all columns.

parameters.name: INSERT_COLUMN
parameters.help: Reposition this column immediately after INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN. "" = skip reordering.

parameters.name: INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Anchor column — INSERT_COLUMN is placed immediately after this column.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Rank rows within groups (or globally), keep top-N, optionally write discarded rows.

parameters.name: PARTITION_BY
parameters.help: Columns to group by before ranking. Empty list [] = global rank (no grouping).

parameters.name: RANK_BY_COLUMN
parameters.help: Column whose values determine the rank.

parameters.name: RANK_ORDER
parameters.help: asc (rank 1 = smallest) | desc (rank 1 = largest).

parameters.name: RANK_METHOD
parameters.help: row_number (unique sequential) | rank (tied rows share same rank) | dense_rank (no gaps).

parameters.name: RANK_COLUMN_NAME
parameters.help: Name of the rank column added to the output.

parameters.name: KEEP_TOP_N
parameters.help: Keep only rows with rank <= N. Set to 0 to keep all rows (just add rank column).

parameters.name: DISCARD_FILENAME
parameters.help: File for rows that don't make the top-N cut. Empty string to silently drop.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the main (top-N) output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Route rows to named files by matching a column against value lists. Unmatched rows go to an 'others' file.

parameters.name: FILTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Column to match against each group's value list.

parameters.name: VALUE_GROUPS
parameters.help: List of routing groups (first-match-wins). Each: {"values": ["VAL1", "VAL2"], "output_filename": "name.csv"}.

parameters.name: CASE_SENSITIVE
parameters.help: If False, matching is case-insensitive.

parameters.name: OTHERS_FILENAME
parameters.help: File for rows that match no group (including nulls). Empty string to discard.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write output files.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Join two files, apply an optional WHERE filter on the result, group-by aggregate, then optionally rank and keep top-N rows. Files are resolved by name from the input list.

parameters.name: LEFT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the left (primary) file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: RIGHT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename of the right file. Matched by basename in input_paths.

parameters.name: LEFT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the left file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: RIGHT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the right file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: LEFT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the left input is a ZIP, extract this named file (e.g. customers.csv). "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_INNER_FILE
parameters.help: When the right input is a ZIP, extract this named file (e.g. invoices.csv). "" = use the first supported file.

parameters.name: DEDUP_RIGHT_BY
parameters.help: Column to deduplicate the right file on before joining. "" = skip deduplication.

parameters.name: DEDUP_KEEP
parameters.help: Which duplicate to keep when deduplicating: "first" or "last".

parameters.name: JOIN_KEYS
parameters.help: List of column names to join on (shared by both files).

parameters.name: JOIN_TYPE
parameters.help: inner | left | right | outer

parameters.name: LEFT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the left file.

parameters.name: RIGHT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the right file.

parameters.name: WHERE_CONDITION
parameters.help: pandas query() expression applied to the joined result before aggregation. "" = no filter. Example: "amount > 100 and status == 'ACTIVE'"

parameters.name: GROUP_BY_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to group by. Use [] to aggregate across all rows without grouping.

parameters.name: AGGREGATIONS
parameters.help: Aggregation rules. Each: {"column": "col_or_*", "function": "count|sum|mean|min|max|nunique|first|last|std", "output_column": "result_col"}. Use column="*" for row count.

parameters.name: RANK_BY_COLUMN
parameters.help: Column to rank aggregated rows by. "" = skip ranking.

parameters.name: RANK_ORDER
parameters.help: asc (rank 1 = smallest) | desc (rank 1 = largest).

parameters.name: RANK_COLUMN_NAME
parameters.help: Name of the rank column added to the output (only used when RANK_BY_COLUMN is set).

parameters.name: KEEP_TOP_N
parameters.help: Keep only rows with rank <= N. 0 = keep all rows.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DROP_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to drop from the result before writing. [] = keep all columns.

parameters.name: INSERT_COLUMN
parameters.help: Reposition this column immediately after INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN. "" = skip reordering.

parameters.name: INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Anchor column — INSERT_COLUMN is placed immediately after this column.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write the output file. "" = same directory as the left input file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Name of the output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
parameters.help: csv | xlsx | json | parquet | tsv

description: Extract two named files from a ZIP, optionally column-select both files, dedup the right file, join on configurable keys (supports different column names on each side), drop unwanted output columns, and optionally reorder a result column. All other ZIP contents can be passed through to the output directory.

parameters.name: LEFT_FILE_IN_ZIP
parameters.help: Filename of the primary (left) file inside the ZIP.

parameters.name: RIGHT_FILE_IN_ZIP
parameters.help: Filename of the secondary (right) file inside the ZIP.

parameters.name: SKIP_EXTENSIONS
parameters.help: File extensions to ignore inside the ZIP. Use [] to extract everything.

parameters.name: EXTRACT_OTHER_FILES
parameters.help: If True, every other file in the ZIP (not LEFT, not RIGHT, not SKIP_EXTENSIONS) is extracted to the output directory and included in the returned list.

parameters.name: LEFT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the LEFT file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: RIGHT_USECOLS
parameters.help: Columns to load from the RIGHT file. [] = load all columns.

parameters.name: DEDUP_RIGHT_BY
parameters.help: Column to deduplicate the RIGHT file on before joining. "" = skip deduplication.

parameters.name: DEDUP_KEEP
parameters.help: Which duplicate occurrence to keep when deduplicating: "first" or "last".

parameters.name: JOIN_KEY
parameters.help: Shared column name used when both files have the same join column name. Overridden per-side by LEFT_KEY / RIGHT_KEY.

parameters.name: LEFT_KEY
parameters.help: Join column name in the LEFT file when it differs from JOIN_KEY. "" = use JOIN_KEY.

parameters.name: RIGHT_KEY
parameters.help: Join column name in the RIGHT file when it differs from JOIN_KEY. "" = use JOIN_KEY.

parameters.name: JOIN_TYPE
parameters.help: Join type: left | inner | right | outer.

parameters.name: LEFT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the LEFT file after the merge.

parameters.name: RIGHT_SUFFIX
parameters.help: Suffix appended to overlapping column names from the RIGHT file after the merge.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DROP_COLUMNS
parameters.help: Columns to drop from the merged result before writing. [] = keep all columns.

parameters.name: INSERT_COLUMN
parameters.help: After the join, reposition this column immediately after INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN. "" = skip reordering.

parameters.name: INSERT_AFTER_COLUMN
parameters.help: Anchor column — INSERT_COLUMN is placed immediately after this column.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_FILENAME
parameters.help: Filename for the merged output file.

parameters.name: OUTPUT_DIR
parameters.help: Directory to write all output files. "" = same directory as the input ZIP file.
